childhood.familyBackground: David Kenneth Roy Thomson, 3rd Baron Thomson of Fleet (born 12 June 1957), is a Canadian and British hereditary peer and media magnate.
childhood.familyBackgroundKo: David Kenneth Roy Thomson, 3rd Baron Thomson of Fleet(1957년 6월 12일 출생)은 캐나다와 영국의 세습 귀족이자 미디어 재벌입니다.
childhood.education: Details of David Thomson's education are not widely documented in public sources.
childhood.educationKo: David Thomson의 교육 세부사항은 공개 자료에서 널리 기록되지 않음.
childhood.earlyLife: David Thomson built a career in Thomson Reuters.
childhood.earlyLifeKo: David Thomson은(는) Thomson Reuters 분야에서 경력을 쌓음.

careerTimeline.event: Established presence in media & entertainment industry
Became a major figure in Thomson Reuters
careerTimeline.eventKo: Thomson Reuters 분야의 주요 인물로 부상

failures.description: COVID-19 pandemic impacted business operations globally
failures.descriptionKo: 코로나19 팬데믹이 전 세계적으로 사업 운영에 영향
failures.lesson: Resilience and adaptability are essential in times of crisis

personalTraits.knownFor: Building wealth through Thomson Reuters. Net worth $6.7B.
personalTraits.knownForKo: Thomson Reuters을(를) 통해 부를 축적. 순자산 9조원.
